product_definition.title: Asymmetric Role System
product_definition.description: A multiplayer asymmetric role assignment and ability framework for UE5.5. Supports games where players have distinct roles with unique abilities, win conditions, and UI (e.g. killer vs survivors, impostor vs crew). Built on GAS.
product_definition.target_audience: Multiplayer game developers building asymmetric horror, social deduction, or party games

core_features: URoleDefinitionDataAsset: role name, abilities, win condition, HUD config
URoleAssignmentComponent: server-assigns roles, replicates to clients
Per-role GAS ability sets granted on role assignment
Role-locked input bindings via Enhanced Input action mapping per role
Win condition evaluator: monitors game state, declares winner by role
Role-specific HUD overlay switching on role assignment
Role reveal sequence: cinematic-style role announcement
Team victory screen with role statistics
Blueprint override points: OnRoleAssigned, OnRoleWin, OnRoleLose

demo_map_requirements.test_scenario: Two players connect, one assigned Killer role, one Survivor, each sees role-specific HUD
